name: GraphicsDrawer
summary: The GraphicsDrawer class draws temporary graphics in the currently active rendered view in Tekla Structures.

constructors.name: GraphicsDrawer
constructors.summary: Creates a new graphics drawer instance.

methods.name: DrawLineSegment(LineSegment, Color)
methods.signature: public bool DrawLineSegment(LineSegment LineSegment, Color Color)
methods.summary: Draws a temporary line segment in the currently active rendered view.

params.name: Color
params.doc: The color of the line. The transparency value of the color is ignored.

methods.name: DrawLineSegment(Point, Point, Color)
methods.signature: public bool DrawLineSegment(Point Point1, Point Point2, Color Color)
methods.summary: Draws a temporary line segment in the currently active rendered view.

params.name: Point1
params.doc: The first point of the line.

params.name: Point2
params.doc: The second point of the line.

params.name: Color
params.doc: The color of the line. The transparency value of the color is ignored.

methods.name: DrawMeshLines
methods.signature: public bool DrawMeshLines(Mesh Mesh, Color Color)
methods.summary: Draws the mesh lines as temporary graphics in the currently active Tekla Structures rendered view.

params.name: Color
params.doc: The color of the mesh lines. The transparency value of the color is ignored.

methods.name: DrawMeshSurface
methods.signature: public bool DrawMeshSurface(Mesh Mesh, Color Color)
methods.summary: Draws the mesh surface as temporary graphics in the currently active Tekla Structures rendered view. The counterclockwise sides of the mesh triangles are drawn.

methods.name: DrawPolyLine
methods.summary: Draw a temporary polyline into all open Tekla Structures views.

returns.doc: The identifier of the temporary graphic. You can delete the graphic with RemoveTemporaryGraphicsObject.

methods.name: DrawText
methods.signature: public bool DrawText(Point Location, string Text, Color Color)
methods.summary: Draws a temporary text in the currently active rendered view.

params.name: Location
params.doc: The location of the text's top-left corner.

params.name: Text
params.doc: The text to be drawn. The maximum length is 511 characters.

params.name: Color
params.doc: The color of the text. The transparency value of the color is ignored.

methods.name: DrawTextToView
methods.signature: public int DrawTextToView(Point Location, string Text, Color Color, View View)
methods.summary: Draws a temporary text to the specified view. You can set the view Identifier.ID = 0 for current active view.

params.name: Location
params.doc: The location of the text's top-left corner.

params.name: Text
params.doc: The text to be drawn. The maximum length is 511 characters.

params.name: Color
params.doc: The color of the text. The transparency value of the color is ignored.

params.name: View
params.doc: The model view (ID = 0 for current active view)

returns.doc: The id of the inserted text.

methods.name: RemoveTemporaryGraphicsObject
methods.summary: Remove a temporary graphic object from all views.

params.name: GraphicObjectID
params.doc: The identifier that was returned when the object was created.

methods.name: RemoveTemporaryGraphicsObjects
methods.summary: Remove a list of temporary graphic objects from all views.

params.name: GraphicObjectIDs
params.doc: The identifiers that was returned when the object was created.
